Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
August 19, 2025
• August Blues Depress Volatility but Rates Hold Strong - An uneventful
Short-term Indicators
fortnight in terms of cargo flow has reduced near-term activity, contributing to a
Momentum: Neutral
decline in spot rate volatility. Nevertheless, spot freight rates for Capesizes
remain at historically high levels for this time of year, a notable achievement given Sentiment: Neutral
the current economic headwinds facing the dry bulk market. Contributing to the Fundamentals: Neutral
current strength are seasonal rains in West Africa that have been weaker than in
prior years, while iron ore exports from Brazil have been stronger than historical
Breakwave Dry
norms.
